entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A fiber crop used to assess the impact of tillage and fertilization

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used to assess the impact of tillage and intercropping

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A leguminous crop used to assess the impact of tillage and intercropping

entities.name: GLIRICIDIA SEPIUM
entities.description: A fast-growing tree species used in agroforestry options

entities.name: LEUCAENA LEUCOCEPHALA
entities.description: A fast-growing tree species used in agroforestry options

entities.name: CONTOUR BUNDING
entities.description: A tillage practice involving the construction of ridges along contours to reduce runoff and erosion

entities.name: NO CONTOUR BUNDING
entities.description: The traditional farmers' tillage practice without contour ridges

entities.name: SOIL FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The application of nutrients to the soil to improve crop growth

entities.name: ORGANIC MANURE
entities.description: A type of soil fertilization using organic matter

entities.name: MICRO-DOSE
entities.description: A precise, small-scale application of fertilizer

entities.name: RECOMMENDED DOSE
entities.description: The standard scale dose of fertilizer application

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously in the same field

entities.name: SPLIT PLOT
entities.description: An experimental design layout used in the field study

entities.name: RUNOFF
entities.description: The flow of water that occurs when excess stormwater runs off the land surface

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The displacement of the upper layer of soil

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content of the soil

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development of the plants, including height and diameter

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced

entities.name: COTTON HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the cotton plant

entities.name: COTTON DIAMETER
entities.description: The thickness of the cotton plant stem

entities.name: WATER TABLE DYNAMIC
entities.description: The movement and level of groundwater relative to the soil surface

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grains per unit area

entities.name: CROWN RADIUS
entities.description: The horizontal distance from the trunk to the edge of the tree canopy

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial gain measured by the Value-Cost Ratio (VCR)
